connectFail: ❌ Connection failed to Custom Server, please check the console logs
connectTimeout: ❌ Connection timed out: ensure the backend is running (e.g. python app.py), listening on 0.0.0.0, the firewall allows the port, and SiYuan can reach that LAN IP. Private IPs cannot use the kernel forward proxy.
failedsearch: Failed to check if document exists
linkReplaced: Replaced the resource URL in this block with the server link
linkReplacedDone:
✅ Upload done. The resource link in this block was updated.
${url}
linkReplaceFail: Upload succeeded, but updating the note link failed
linkReplaceNoBlock: Upload succeeded, but block ID was not found for auto-replace
linkReplaceNoMatch: Upload succeeded; original path not found in this block, please replace manually
networkResource: Resource is a network resource, please download it first
noServerConfigured: Add at least one server URL in settings
allServersDisabled: No enabled servers: enable at least one server for uploads.
